---
title: "Volunteer"
toc: false
---

# Thinking of Volunteering?
We would love for you to join our volunteer community. There are so many ways you can get involved in advocating for community cats!

We are looking for volunteers who can help in any capacity. When you become a volunteer, we will offer live or virtual training for the tasks you are planning or willing to assist with. Complete our Volunteer Application to learn more about how you can help.

[Volunteer Application](https://form.jotform.com/232270824512146){.main-button}

```{=html}
<div class="jotform-wrapper">

<iframe
  id="JotFormIFrame-233584882215159"
  title="Request Form"
  allowtransparency="true"
  allow="geolocation; microphone; camera; fullscreen"
  src="https://form.jotform.com/232270824512146"
  frameborder="0"
  style="
    min-width:100%;
    max-width:100%;
    height:1200px;
    border:none;
  "
  scrolling="no">
</iframe>

</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
var ifr = document.getElementById("JotFormIFrame-233584882215159");

if (ifr) {
  window.addEventListener("message", function(e) {
    if (typeof e.data === 'string' && e.data.indexOf("setHeight") > -1) {
      var height = e.data.split(":")[1];
      ifr.style.height = height + "px";
    }
  }, false);
}
</script>
```
